# SY MARKETING — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Shachar is a personal brand in the digital marketing and social media space with 5 years of experience. She helps business owners stop guessing and start creating content that actually generates leads and client inquiries. Her brand is built around a premium, clean, and modern aesthetic — white, cream, black, and gold tones — with a strong personal authority voice. The landing page is designed as a lead-generation machine focused on capturing WhatsApp contacts in exchange for a free PDF guide titled '7 Types of Posts That Bring Clients (Not Just Likes)', with automated WhatsApp delivery and a thank-you page that drives users to a WhatsApp community group.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About SY MARKETING
Shachar is a personal brand in the digital marketing and social media space with 5 years of experience. She helps business owners stop guessing and start creating content that actually generates leads and client inquiries. Her brand is built around a premium, clean, and modern aesthetic — white, cream, black, and gold tones — with a strong personal authority voice. The landing page is designed as a lead-generation machine focused on capturing WhatsApp contacts in exchange for a free PDF guide titled '7 Types of Posts That Bring Clients (Not Just Likes)', with automated WhatsApp delivery and a thank-you page that drives users to a WhatsApp community group.

## Target Audience
בעלי עסקים שמעלים תוכן ברשתות חברתיות ולא מקבלים פניות

## Industry
שיווק דיגיטלי וסושיאל מדיה

---
